scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && node scripts/wait-for-db.js && npm run db:migrate
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix user-service" "npm run dev --prefix task-service" "npm run dev --prefix payment-service" "npm run dev --prefix search-service" "npm run dev --prefix notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix email-service" "npm run dev --prefix chat-service"
